reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the occupations associated with Zane Grey and Bhabananda Deka.
2. Compare those occupations and return which named author was a dentist.
original_final_question: Which author was a dentist, Zane Grey or Bhabananda Deka? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Zane Grey is described as a dentist and author, while Bhabananda Deka is described as an economist and author, so the author who was a dentist was Pearl Zane Grey. -> Pearl Zane Grey
